title: centrolepis milleri
intro: Centrolepis milleri, also known as New Zealand pygmy club moss or centrolepis, is a small, flowering plant species that belongs to the family Centrolepidaceae. This plant has been found to have potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Centrolepis milleri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Centrolepis milleri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
